model_phrasing: gpt-5 family detected from the system prompt; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4

frame.objective: Remove the dead full-candidate artifact from the product working tree while preserving its evidence.

allowed: Restore only pkg/core/lite/src/scope.ts to exact commit 293dcdf2 content using apply_patch; verify hashes and no remaining product diff.
forbidden: Touch OKRA history, other product files, discard unrelated work, use destructive git reset/checkout, commit, push, merge, release, publish, or deploy.

frame.human_confirmation_boundary: Only the human changes the frame or release authority.

previous_dkr_checkpoint.hypothesis_verdict: full lazy-state candidate is dead as target-satisfying

assignment: Use apply_patch to reverse only the current scope.ts candidate diff. Verify the resulting file hash equals the exact baseline source hash and `git diff 293dcdf2 -- pkg/core/lite/src/scope.ts` is empty. Do not run product tests because the result is byte-identical to the already accepted product commit. Record one governed finish report.
budget_and_stop_rule: 10 minutes; stop when exact hash and empty product diff hold, or hand back on any unrelated overlap.
hand_back_rule: PKRs hand back on unknown discovery instead of resolving overlap or discarding work.

output_schema.required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
